payload.body: Repro from RT-82 session: a failed mirror (R3001 mid-tree) left a partial /tmp/trust-cache/<hash>/ dir; prepare_strict_input's 'cached_file.exists()' root-file check then treated it as complete on later runs, producing phantom diagnostics/passes that flip depending on which wrapper build ran first. Cache key is FNV(source + CARGO_PKG_VERSION) so trust-lower code changes within a version reuse stale lowered output. Fix ideas: mirror into a temp dir + atomic rename of the WHOLE dir on success (no partial state), and mix a build/code fingerprint (e.g. compile-time hash or git sha) into the key for dev builds.
